targets.queryText:
WITH runtime AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at, MAX(tick) AS latest_tick, COUNT(*) AS sample_count
  FROM runtime_room_metrics
), refresh AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at, COUNT(*) AS sample_count
  FROM metric_observations
  WHERE metric_name = 'source.rl_metrics_refresh.completed'
), dataset_time AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at FROM rl_dataset_gate_metrics
), dataset AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS observed_at,
         MAX(gate_id) AS gate_id,
         MAX(status) AS status,
         MAX(source_artifact) AS source_artifact,
         MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'rl.dataset_gate.sample_count' THEN value END) AS sample_count,
         MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'rl.dataset_gate.quality_samples_accepted' THEN value END) AS accepted_samples,
         MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'rl.dataset_gate.quality_samples_rejected' THEN value END) AS rejected_samples
  FROM rl_dataset_gate_metrics
  WHERE observed_at = (SELECT latest_at FROM dataset_time)
), training AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at, COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) AS report_count
  FROM rl_training_execution_metrics
), scorecard AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at,
         COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) AS report_count,
         COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name IN ('rl.policy.advantage_territory','rl.policy.advantage_resources','rl.policy.advantage_kills') THEN value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS utility_delta
  FROM rl_policy_advantage_metrics
  WHERE report_id = (SELECT report_id FROM rl_policy_advantage_metrics ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 1)
), ledger AS (
  SELECT MAX(created_at) AS latest_at, COUNT(*) AS decision_count
  FROM metric_iteration_decisions
), instrumentation AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS blocker_count,
         MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at
  FROM metric_coverage_gaps
  WHERE metric_name IN (
    'creep.stuck_ticks','creep.low_load_return_count','cpu.used','cpu.bucket',
    'reliability.loop_exception_count','reliability.telemetry_silence_ticks',
    'territory.controller_progress','upgrade.carried_energy','economy.import_demand',
    'economy.blocked_import_energy','economy.multi_room_deficit_energy'
  )
), gameplay AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS blocker_count, MAX(first_seen_at) AS latest_at
  FROM gameplay_behavior_findings
  WHERE category IN ('stalled-construction','runtime-reliability','missing-late-defense-construction')
), state AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN runtime.latest_at IS NULL OR refresh.latest_at IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA'
    WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', runtime.latest_at)) > 21600 THEN 'STALE_DATA'
    WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', refresh.latest_at)) > 21600 THEN 'STALE_DATA'
    WHEN instrumentation.blocker_count > 0 THEN 'FIX_INSTRUMENTATION'
    WHEN gameplay.blocker_count > 0 THEN 'FIX_GAMEPLAY'
    WHEN dataset.status IS NULL OR lower(dataset.status) != 'pass' THEN 'TRAIN_MORE'
    WHEN scorecard.utility_delta > 0 THEN 'ROLL_OUT_ALLOWED'
    ELSE 'TRAIN_MORE'
  END AS flywheel_state
  FROM runtime, refresh, dataset, training, scorecard, ledger, instrumentation, gameplay
)
SELECT 1 AS sort, 'flywheel_state' AS item, state.flywheel_state AS status,
       'ROLL_OUT_ALLOWED|TRAIN_MORE|FIX_GAMEPLAY|FIX_INSTRUMENTATION|STALE_DATA|STOP' AS allowed_states,
       NULL AS latest_utc, NULL AS age_hours,
       '#1627' AS issue, 'docs/ops/grafana/screeps-rl-gameplay-metrics.json' AS link,
       'runtimeTick=' || COALESCE(CAST(runtime.latest_tick AS TEXT), 'none') || '; datasetGate=' || COALESCE(dataset.status, 'missing') || '; utilityDelta=' || COALESCE(CAST(scorecard.utility_delta AS TEXT), 'missing') AS evidence,
       CASE state.flywheel_state
         WHEN 'ROLL_OUT_ALLOWED' THEN 'Prepare a canary only after controller confirms fresh proof and rollback criteria.'
         WHEN 'TRAIN_MORE' THEN 'Collect or train more scaled evidence before rollout.'
         WHEN 'FIX_GAMEPLAY' THEN 'Open the top room bottleneck gameplay fix before the next RL iteration.'
         WHEN 'FIX_INSTRUMENTATION' THEN 'Instrument missing scorecard/runtime metrics before trusting RL improvement.'
         WHEN 'STALE_DATA' THEN 'Refresh runtime, dataset, training, scorecard, and ledger evidence before acting.'
         ELSE 'Stop rollout and require owner review.'
       END AS next_action
FROM state, runtime, refresh, dataset, scorecard
UNION ALL
SELECT 2, 'freshness:runtime',
       CASE WHEN runtime.latest_at IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA' WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', runtime.latest_at)) <= 21600 THEN 'FRESH' ELSE 'STALE_DATA' END,
       '', runtime.latest_at, ROUND((strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', runtime.latest_at)) / 3600.0, 1), '#1627', 'runtime-artifacts/runtime-summary-console/',
       'samples=' || runtime.sample_count, 'Refresh runtime summary artifacts if stale.'
FROM runtime
UNION ALL
SELECT 3, 'freshness:dataset_gate',
       CASE WHEN dataset.observed_at IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA' WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', dataset.observed_at)) <= 86400 THEN 'FRESH' ELSE 'STALE_DATA' END,
       '', dataset.observed_at, ROUND((strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', dataset.observed_at)) / 3600.0, 1), '#1627', COALESCE(dataset.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-control-loop/'),
       'gate=' || COALESCE(dataset.gate_id, 'missing') || '; status=' || COALESCE(dataset.status, 'missing') || '; samples=' || COALESCE(CAST(dataset.sample_count AS TEXT), 'missing'),
       'Refresh dataset gate or collect accepted samples if stale/failing.'
FROM dataset
UNION ALL
SELECT 4, 'freshness:training_scorecard',
       CASE WHEN training.latest_at IS NULL OR scorecard.latest_at IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA' WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', training.latest_at)) <= 86400 AND (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', scorecard.latest_at)) <= 86400 THEN 'FRESH' ELSE 'STALE_DATA' END,
       '', COALESCE(scorecard.latest_at, training.latest_at), ROUND((strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', COALESCE(scorecard.latest_at, training.latest_at))) / 3600.0, 1), '#1627', 'runtime-artifacts/rl-training/',
       'trainingReports=' || training.report_count || '; scorecards=' || scorecard.report_count || '; utilityDelta=' || scorecard.utility_delta,
       'Run scorecard/training refresh before a rollout decision.'
FROM training, scorecard
UNION ALL
SELECT 5, 'freshness:decision_ledger',
       CASE WHEN ledger.latest_at IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA' WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', ledger.latest_at)) <= 86400 THEN 'FRESH' ELSE 'STALE_DATA' END,
       '', ledger.latest_at, ROUND((strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', ledger.latest_at)) / 3600.0, 1), '#1627', 'runtime-artifacts/rl-control-loop/',
       'decisions=' || ledger.decision_count, 'Record the next action in the decision ledger.'
FROM ledger
ORDER BY sort;
targets.rawQueryText:
WITH runtime AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at, MAX(tick) AS latest_tick, COUNT(*) AS sample_count
  FROM runtime_room_metrics
), refresh AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at, COUNT(*) AS sample_count
  FROM metric_observations
  WHERE metric_name = 'source.rl_metrics_refresh.completed'
), dataset_time AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at FROM rl_dataset_gate_metrics
), dataset AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS observed_at,
         MAX(gate_id) AS gate_id,
         MAX(status) AS status,
         MAX(source_artifact) AS source_artifact,
         MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'rl.dataset_gate.sample_count' THEN value END) AS sample_count,
         MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'rl.dataset_gate.quality_samples_accepted' THEN value END) AS accepted_samples,
         MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'rl.dataset_gate.quality_samples_rejected' THEN value END) AS rejected_samples
  FROM rl_dataset_gate_metrics
  WHERE observed_at = (SELECT latest_at FROM dataset_time)
), training AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at, COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) AS report_count
  FROM rl_training_execution_metrics
), scorecard AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at,
         COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) AS report_count,
         COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name IN ('rl.policy.advantage_territory','rl.policy.advantage_resources','rl.policy.advantage_kills') THEN value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS utility_delta
  FROM rl_policy_advantage_metrics
  WHERE report_id = (SELECT report_id FROM rl_policy_advantage_metrics ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 1)
), ledger AS (
  SELECT MAX(created_at) AS latest_at, COUNT(*) AS decision_count
  FROM metric_iteration_decisions
), instrumentation AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS blocker_count,
         MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at
  FROM metric_coverage_gaps
  WHERE metric_name IN (
    'creep.stuck_ticks','creep.low_load_return_count','cpu.used','cpu.bucket',
    'reliability.loop_exception_count','reliability.telemetry_silence_ticks',
    'territory.controller_progress','upgrade.carried_energy','economy.import_demand',
    'economy.blocked_import_energy','economy.multi_room_deficit_energy'
  )
), gameplay AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS blocker_count, MAX(first_seen_at) AS latest_at
  FROM gameplay_behavior_findings
  WHERE category IN ('stalled-construction','runtime-reliability','missing-late-defense-construction')
), state AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN runtime.latest_at IS NULL OR refresh.latest_at IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA'
    WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', runtime.latest_at)) > 21600 THEN 'STALE_DATA'
    WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', refresh.latest_at)) > 21600 THEN 'STALE_DATA'
    WHEN instrumentation.blocker_count > 0 THEN 'FIX_INSTRUMENTATION'
    WHEN gameplay.blocker_count > 0 THEN 'FIX_GAMEPLAY'
    WHEN dataset.status IS NULL OR lower(dataset.status) != 'pass' THEN 'TRAIN_MORE'
    WHEN scorecard.utility_delta > 0 THEN 'ROLL_OUT_ALLOWED'
    ELSE 'TRAIN_MORE'
  END AS flywheel_state
  FROM runtime, refresh, dataset, training, scorecard, ledger, instrumentation, gameplay
)
SELECT 1 AS sort, 'flywheel_state' AS item, state.flywheel_state AS status,
       'ROLL_OUT_ALLOWED|TRAIN_MORE|FIX_GAMEPLAY|FIX_INSTRUMENTATION|STALE_DATA|STOP' AS allowed_states,
       NULL AS latest_utc, NULL AS age_hours,
       '#1627' AS issue, 'docs/ops/grafana/screeps-rl-gameplay-metrics.json' AS link,
       'runtimeTick=' || COALESCE(CAST(runtime.latest_tick AS TEXT), 'none') || '; datasetGate=' || COALESCE(dataset.status, 'missing') || '; utilityDelta=' || COALESCE(CAST(scorecard.utility_delta AS TEXT), 'missing') AS evidence,
       CASE state.flywheel_state
         WHEN 'ROLL_OUT_ALLOWED' THEN 'Prepare a canary only after controller confirms fresh proof and rollback criteria.'
         WHEN 'TRAIN_MORE' THEN 'Collect or train more scaled evidence before rollout.'
         WHEN 'FIX_GAMEPLAY' THEN 'Open the top room bottleneck gameplay fix before the next RL iteration.'
         WHEN 'FIX_INSTRUMENTATION' THEN 'Instrument missing scorecard/runtime metrics before trusting RL improvement.'
         WHEN 'STALE_DATA' THEN 'Refresh runtime, dataset, training, scorecard, and ledger evidence before acting.'
         ELSE 'Stop rollout and require owner review.'
       END AS next_action
FROM state, runtime, refresh, dataset, scorecard
UNION ALL
SELECT 2, 'freshness:runtime',
       CASE WHEN runtime.latest_at IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA' WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', runtime.latest_at)) <= 21600 THEN 'FRESH' ELSE 'STALE_DATA' END,
       '', runtime.latest_at, ROUND((strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', runtime.latest_at)) / 3600.0, 1), '#1627', 'runtime-artifacts/runtime-summary-console/',
       'samples=' || runtime.sample_count, 'Refresh runtime summary artifacts if stale.'
FROM runtime
UNION ALL
SELECT 3, 'freshness:dataset_gate',
       CASE WHEN dataset.observed_at IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA' WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', dataset.observed_at)) <= 86400 THEN 'FRESH' ELSE 'STALE_DATA' END,
       '', dataset.observed_at, ROUND((strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', dataset.observed_at)) / 3600.0, 1), '#1627', COALESCE(dataset.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-control-loop/'),
       'gate=' || COALESCE(dataset.gate_id, 'missing') || '; status=' || COALESCE(dataset.status, 'missing') || '; samples=' || COALESCE(CAST(dataset.sample_count AS TEXT), 'missing'),
       'Refresh dataset gate or collect accepted samples if stale/failing.'
FROM dataset
UNION ALL
SELECT 4, 'freshness:training_scorecard',
       CASE WHEN training.latest_at IS NULL OR scorecard.latest_at IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA' WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', training.latest_at)) <= 86400 AND (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', scorecard.latest_at)) <= 86400 THEN 'FRESH' ELSE 'STALE_DATA' END,
       '', COALESCE(scorecard.latest_at, training.latest_at), ROUND((strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', COALESCE(scorecard.latest_at, training.latest_at))) / 3600.0, 1), '#1627', 'runtime-artifacts/rl-training/',
       'trainingReports=' || training.report_count || '; scorecards=' || scorecard.report_count || '; utilityDelta=' || scorecard.utility_delta,
       'Run scorecard/training refresh before a rollout decision.'
FROM training, scorecard
UNION ALL
SELECT 5, 'freshness:decision_ledger',
       CASE WHEN ledger.latest_at IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA' WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', ledger.latest_at)) <= 86400 THEN 'FRESH' ELSE 'STALE_DATA' END,
       '', ledger.latest_at, ROUND((strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', ledger.latest_at)) / 3600.0, 1), '#1627', 'runtime-artifacts/rl-control-loop/',
       'decisions=' || ledger.decision_count, 'Record the next action in the decision ledger.'
FROM ledger
ORDER BY sort;

targets.queryText:
WITH latest_report AS (
  SELECT report_id, MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at
  FROM rl_policy_advantage_metrics
  GROUP BY report_id
  ORDER BY latest_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
), policy AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM rl_policy_advantage_metrics
  WHERE report_id = (SELECT report_id FROM latest_report)
), utility AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS metric_count,
         MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at,
         COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name IN ('rl.policy.advantage_territory','rl.policy.advantage_resources','rl.policy.advantage_kills') THEN value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS utility_delta,
         MAX(candidate_id) AS candidate_id,
         MAX(incumbent_id) AS baseline_id,
         MAX(source_artifact) AS source_artifact
  FROM policy
), category_specs(sort, category, metric_name, why_it_matters, next_action) AS (
  VALUES
    (10, 'safety/reliability', NULL, 'Rollout must not trade survival, exceptions, or telemetry integrity for reward.', 'Add fresh safety/reliability scorecard fields before rollout.'),
    (20, 'territory', 'rl.policy.advantage_territory', 'Territory is the highest strategic objective after survival.', 'Compare candidate vs baseline owned-room/controller movement.'),
    (30, 'resources', 'rl.policy.advantage_resources', 'Resource advantage decides whether expansion is sustainable.', 'Compare candidate vs baseline stored/harvested energy.'),
    (40, 'construction/infrastructure', NULL, 'Construction stalls block RCL and extension capacity gains.', 'Add construction/infrastructure category delta to the scorecard.'),
    (50, 'creep efficiency', NULL, 'Low-load or stuck creep behavior can fake progress while wasting CPU/ticks.', 'Instrument creep efficiency delta before trusting the policy.'),
    (60, 'defense/combat', 'rl.policy.advantage_kills', 'Combat and defense regressions can make expansion unsafe.', 'Keep combat delta non-negative and verify defense findings.'),
    (70, 'CPU/reliability', NULL, 'CPU bucket/exception regressions can crash the tick loop.', 'Add CPU/reliability category delta to the scorecard.'),
    (80, 'RL process quality', NULL, 'Fresh scaled gates and ledger entries are required for a safe RL iteration.', 'Refresh dataset/training/decision ledger proof before acting.')
), latest_decision AS (
  SELECT created_at, decision_key, status, rationale, source_artifact
  FROM metric_iteration_decisions
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 1 AS sort, 'candidate_vs_baseline_utility_delta' AS scorecard_row,
       COALESCE(utility.candidate_id, 'NO_CANDIDATE') AS candidate,
       COALESCE(utility.baseline_id, 'NO_BASELINE') AS baseline,
       utility.utility_delta AS delta,
       CASE
         WHEN utility.metric_count = 0 THEN 'BLOCKER_NO_FRESH_SCORECARD'
         WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', utility.latest_at)) > 86400 THEN 'BLOCKER_STALE_SCORECARD'
         WHEN utility.utility_delta > 0 THEN 'IMPROVED'
         WHEN utility.utility_delta = 0 THEN 'NEUTRAL'
         ELSE 'REGRESSED'
       END AS status,
       utility.latest_at AS evidence_utc,
       'territory/resources/combat utility delta from rl_policy_advantage_metrics' AS evidence,
       'ROLLBACK if safety/reliability regresses or candidate utility is non-positive after fresh scaled proof.' AS rollback_criterion,
       '#1627' AS linked_issue,
       COALESCE(utility.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-training/') AS source_artifact
FROM utility
UNION ALL
SELECT category_specs.sort, category_specs.category,
       COALESCE(utility.candidate_id, 'NO_CANDIDATE'), COALESCE(utility.baseline_id, 'NO_BASELINE'), policy.value,
       CASE
         WHEN utility.metric_count = 0 THEN 'BLOCKER_NO_FRESH_SCORECARD'
         WHEN category_specs.metric_name IS NULL THEN 'BLOCKER_MISSING_CATEGORY_DELTA'
         WHEN policy.value IS NULL THEN 'BLOCKER_MISSING_CATEGORY_DELTA'
         WHEN policy.value > 0 THEN 'WIN'
         WHEN policy.value = 0 THEN 'NEUTRAL'
         ELSE 'LOSS'
       END,
       COALESCE(policy.observed_at, utility.latest_at),
       category_specs.why_it_matters,
       'ROLLBACK if this category regresses in a fresh scorecard.',
       '#1627',
       category_specs.next_action
FROM category_specs
CROSS JOIN utility
LEFT JOIN policy ON policy.metric_name = category_specs.metric_name
UNION ALL
SELECT 90, 'reward_decision_linkage', COALESCE(utility.candidate_id, 'NO_CANDIDATE'), COALESCE(utility.baseline_id, 'NO_BASELINE'), NULL,
       COALESCE(latest_decision.status, 'BLOCKER_NO_DECISION_LEDGER'), latest_decision.created_at,
       COALESCE(latest_decision.rationale, 'No decision ledger row links reward/model/gameplay changes to this scorecard.'),
       'Decision ledger must state rollback criteria before canary.', '#1627', COALESCE(latest_decision.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-control-loop/')
FROM utility LEFT JOIN latest_decision ON 1 = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 100, 'rollback_criterion', COALESCE(utility.candidate_id, 'NO_CANDIDATE'), COALESCE(utility.baseline_id, 'NO_BASELINE'), NULL,
       'DEFINED', utility.latest_at,
       'Rollback on safety/reliability loss, negative utility delta, stale proof, or untriaged gameplay/instrumentation blocker.',
       'STOP/rollback candidate and file the linked issue before the next rollout.', '#1627', COALESCE(utility.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-training/')
FROM utility
ORDER BY sort;
targets.rawQueryText:
WITH latest_report AS (
  SELECT report_id, MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at
  FROM rl_policy_advantage_metrics
  GROUP BY report_id
  ORDER BY latest_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
), policy AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM rl_policy_advantage_metrics
  WHERE report_id = (SELECT report_id FROM latest_report)
), utility AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS metric_count,
         MAX(observed_at) AS latest_at,
         COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name IN ('rl.policy.advantage_territory','rl.policy.advantage_resources','rl.policy.advantage_kills') THEN value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS utility_delta,
         MAX(candidate_id) AS candidate_id,
         MAX(incumbent_id) AS baseline_id,
         MAX(source_artifact) AS source_artifact
  FROM policy
), category_specs(sort, category, metric_name, why_it_matters, next_action) AS (
  VALUES
    (10, 'safety/reliability', NULL, 'Rollout must not trade survival, exceptions, or telemetry integrity for reward.', 'Add fresh safety/reliability scorecard fields before rollout.'),
    (20, 'territory', 'rl.policy.advantage_territory', 'Territory is the highest strategic objective after survival.', 'Compare candidate vs baseline owned-room/controller movement.'),
    (30, 'resources', 'rl.policy.advantage_resources', 'Resource advantage decides whether expansion is sustainable.', 'Compare candidate vs baseline stored/harvested energy.'),
    (40, 'construction/infrastructure', NULL, 'Construction stalls block RCL and extension capacity gains.', 'Add construction/infrastructure category delta to the scorecard.'),
    (50, 'creep efficiency', NULL, 'Low-load or stuck creep behavior can fake progress while wasting CPU/ticks.', 'Instrument creep efficiency delta before trusting the policy.'),
    (60, 'defense/combat', 'rl.policy.advantage_kills', 'Combat and defense regressions can make expansion unsafe.', 'Keep combat delta non-negative and verify defense findings.'),
    (70, 'CPU/reliability', NULL, 'CPU bucket/exception regressions can crash the tick loop.', 'Add CPU/reliability category delta to the scorecard.'),
    (80, 'RL process quality', NULL, 'Fresh scaled gates and ledger entries are required for a safe RL iteration.', 'Refresh dataset/training/decision ledger proof before acting.')
), latest_decision AS (
  SELECT created_at, decision_key, status, rationale, source_artifact
  FROM metric_iteration_decisions
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 1 AS sort, 'candidate_vs_baseline_utility_delta' AS scorecard_row,
       COALESCE(utility.candidate_id, 'NO_CANDIDATE') AS candidate,
       COALESCE(utility.baseline_id, 'NO_BASELINE') AS baseline,
       utility.utility_delta AS delta,
       CASE
         WHEN utility.metric_count = 0 THEN 'BLOCKER_NO_FRESH_SCORECARD'
         WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', utility.latest_at)) > 86400 THEN 'BLOCKER_STALE_SCORECARD'
         WHEN utility.utility_delta > 0 THEN 'IMPROVED'
         WHEN utility.utility_delta = 0 THEN 'NEUTRAL'
         ELSE 'REGRESSED'
       END AS status,
       utility.latest_at AS evidence_utc,
       'territory/resources/combat utility delta from rl_policy_advantage_metrics' AS evidence,
       'ROLLBACK if safety/reliability regresses or candidate utility is non-positive after fresh scaled proof.' AS rollback_criterion,
       '#1627' AS linked_issue,
       COALESCE(utility.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-training/') AS source_artifact
FROM utility
UNION ALL
SELECT category_specs.sort, category_specs.category,
       COALESCE(utility.candidate_id, 'NO_CANDIDATE'), COALESCE(utility.baseline_id, 'NO_BASELINE'), policy.value,
       CASE
         WHEN utility.metric_count = 0 THEN 'BLOCKER_NO_FRESH_SCORECARD'
         WHEN category_specs.metric_name IS NULL THEN 'BLOCKER_MISSING_CATEGORY_DELTA'
         WHEN policy.value IS NULL THEN 'BLOCKER_MISSING_CATEGORY_DELTA'
         WHEN policy.value > 0 THEN 'WIN'
         WHEN policy.value = 0 THEN 'NEUTRAL'
         ELSE 'LOSS'
       END,
       COALESCE(policy.observed_at, utility.latest_at),
       category_specs.why_it_matters,
       'ROLLBACK if this category regresses in a fresh scorecard.',
       '#1627',
       category_specs.next_action
FROM category_specs
CROSS JOIN utility
LEFT JOIN policy ON policy.metric_name = category_specs.metric_name
UNION ALL
SELECT 90, 'reward_decision_linkage', COALESCE(utility.candidate_id, 'NO_CANDIDATE'), COALESCE(utility.baseline_id, 'NO_BASELINE'), NULL,
       COALESCE(latest_decision.status, 'BLOCKER_NO_DECISION_LEDGER'), latest_decision.created_at,
       COALESCE(latest_decision.rationale, 'No decision ledger row links reward/model/gameplay changes to this scorecard.'),
       'Decision ledger must state rollback criteria before canary.', '#1627', COALESCE(latest_decision.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-control-loop/')
FROM utility LEFT JOIN latest_decision ON 1 = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 100, 'rollback_criterion', COALESCE(utility.candidate_id, 'NO_CANDIDATE'), COALESCE(utility.baseline_id, 'NO_BASELINE'), NULL,
       'DEFINED', utility.latest_at,
       'Rollback on safety/reliability loss, negative utility delta, stale proof, or untriaged gameplay/instrumentation blocker.',
       'STOP/rollback candidate and file the linked issue before the next rollout.', '#1627', COALESCE(utility.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-training/')
FROM utility
ORDER BY sort;

targets.queryText:
WITH latest_tick AS (
  SELECT MAX(tick) AS tick FROM runtime_room_metrics
), latest_rooms AS (
  SELECT room_name, tick, rcl_level, stored_energy, extension_count, extension_capacity_contribution,
         pending_build_progress, build_carried_energy, build_blocked_reason, construction_site_count,
         construction_deadlock_ticks, path_finding_failures, destination_blocked,
         worker_load_trip_energy_mean, worker_load_trip_energy_min, cpu_used, cpu_bucket,
         observed_at, source_artifact
  FROM runtime_room_metrics
  WHERE tick = (SELECT tick FROM latest_tick)
), findings_by_room AS (
  SELECT room_name, COUNT(*) AS finding_count, group_concat(DISTINCT category) AS categories,
         MAX(first_seen_at) AS latest_finding_at
  FROM gameplay_behavior_findings
  WHERE room_name IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY room_name
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN pending_build_progress > 0 AND COALESCE(build_carried_energy, 0) = 0 THEN 1
      WHEN construction_site_count > 0 AND build_blocked_reason IS NOT NULL THEN 2
      WHEN rcl_level IS NULL OR stored_energy IS NULL THEN 3
      WHEN cpu_used IS NULL AND cpu_bucket IS NULL THEN 4
      ELSE 9
    END AS priority,
    latest_rooms.room_name AS room,
    rcl_level AS rcl,
    stored_energy,
    extension_capacity_contribution AS extension_capacity,
    pending_build_progress AS construction_backlog,
    CASE
      WHEN pending_build_progress > 0 AND COALESCE(build_carried_energy, 0) = 0 THEN 'STALLED_NO_BUILD_ENERGY'
      WHEN pending_build_progress > 0 THEN 'BUILDING_OR_BACKLOG_PRESENT'
      WHEN construction_site_count = 0 THEN 'NO_ACTIVE_SITES'
      ELSE 'WATCH'
    END AS build_activity,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(findings_by_room.categories, '') LIKE '%defense%' THEN 'DEFENSE_FINDING' ELSE 'NO_CURRENT_FINDING' END AS defense_state,
    CASE
      WHEN path_finding_failures IS NULL AND destination_blocked IS NULL AND worker_load_trip_energy_mean IS NULL THEN 'NOT_INSTRUMENTED'
      WHEN COALESCE(path_finding_failures, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(destination_blocked, 0) > 0 THEN 'BLOCKED_PATHING'
      ELSE 'MEASURED'
    END AS creep_efficiency_state,
    CASE
      WHEN cpu_used IS NULL AND cpu_bucket IS NULL THEN 'NOT_INSTRUMENTED'
      WHEN cpu_bucket < 500 THEN 'CPU_BUCKET_RISK'
      ELSE 'MEASURED'
    END AS cpu_reliability_state,
    CASE
      WHEN pending_build_progress > 0 AND COALESCE(build_carried_energy, 0) = 0 THEN 'FIX_GAMEPLAY'
      WHEN rcl_level IS NULL OR stored_energy IS NULL OR (cpu_used IS NULL AND cpu_bucket IS NULL) THEN 'FIX_INSTRUMENTATION'
      ELSE 'WATCH'
    END AS status,
    CASE
      WHEN pending_build_progress > 0 AND COALESCE(build_carried_energy, 0) = 0 THEN 'Prioritize builder energy/construction stall fix for this room.'
      WHEN rcl_level IS NULL OR stored_energy IS NULL THEN 'Repair runtime room RCL/storage instrumentation.'
      WHEN cpu_used IS NULL AND cpu_bucket IS NULL THEN 'Instrument CPU/bucket telemetry for room health ranking.'
      ELSE 'Keep monitoring; no immediate gameplay blocker from latest room row.'
    END AS action,
    latest_rooms.observed_at AS evidence_utc,
    latest_rooms.source_artifact AS evidence
  FROM latest_rooms
  LEFT JOIN findings_by_room ON findings_by_room.room_name = latest_rooms.room_name
)
SELECT priority, room, rcl, stored_energy, extension_capacity, construction_backlog, build_activity,
       defense_state, creep_efficiency_state, cpu_reliability_state, status, action, evidence_utc, evidence
FROM ranked
UNION ALL
SELECT 999, 'NO_RUNTIME_ROOM_ROWS', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'NO_DATA', 'NO_DATA', 'NO_DATA', 'NO_DATA',
       'STALE_DATA', 'Refresh runtime_room_metrics before ranking gameplay bottlenecks.', NULL,
       'runtime-artifacts/runtime-summary-console/'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM latest_rooms)
ORDER BY priority, room;
targets.rawQueryText:
WITH latest_tick AS (
  SELECT MAX(tick) AS tick FROM runtime_room_metrics
), latest_rooms AS (
  SELECT room_name, tick, rcl_level, stored_energy, extension_count, extension_capacity_contribution,
         pending_build_progress, build_carried_energy, build_blocked_reason, construction_site_count,
         construction_deadlock_ticks, path_finding_failures, destination_blocked,
         worker_load_trip_energy_mean, worker_load_trip_energy_min, cpu_used, cpu_bucket,
         observed_at, source_artifact
  FROM runtime_room_metrics
  WHERE tick = (SELECT tick FROM latest_tick)
), findings_by_room AS (
  SELECT room_name, COUNT(*) AS finding_count, group_concat(DISTINCT category) AS categories,
         MAX(first_seen_at) AS latest_finding_at
  FROM gameplay_behavior_findings
  WHERE room_name IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY room_name
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN pending_build_progress > 0 AND COALESCE(build_carried_energy, 0) = 0 THEN 1
      WHEN construction_site_count > 0 AND build_blocked_reason IS NOT NULL THEN 2
      WHEN rcl_level IS NULL OR stored_energy IS NULL THEN 3
      WHEN cpu_used IS NULL AND cpu_bucket IS NULL THEN 4
      ELSE 9
    END AS priority,
    latest_rooms.room_name AS room,
    rcl_level AS rcl,
    stored_energy,
    extension_capacity_contribution AS extension_capacity,
    pending_build_progress AS construction_backlog,
    CASE
      WHEN pending_build_progress > 0 AND COALESCE(build_carried_energy, 0) = 0 THEN 'STALLED_NO_BUILD_ENERGY'
      WHEN pending_build_progress > 0 THEN 'BUILDING_OR_BACKLOG_PRESENT'
      WHEN construction_site_count = 0 THEN 'NO_ACTIVE_SITES'
      ELSE 'WATCH'
    END AS build_activity,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(findings_by_room.categories, '') LIKE '%defense%' THEN 'DEFENSE_FINDING' ELSE 'NO_CURRENT_FINDING' END AS defense_state,
    CASE
      WHEN path_finding_failures IS NULL AND destination_blocked IS NULL AND worker_load_trip_energy_mean IS NULL THEN 'NOT_INSTRUMENTED'
      WHEN COALESCE(path_finding_failures, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(destination_blocked, 0) > 0 THEN 'BLOCKED_PATHING'
      ELSE 'MEASURED'
    END AS creep_efficiency_state,
    CASE
      WHEN cpu_used IS NULL AND cpu_bucket IS NULL THEN 'NOT_INSTRUMENTED'
      WHEN cpu_bucket < 500 THEN 'CPU_BUCKET_RISK'
      ELSE 'MEASURED'
    END AS cpu_reliability_state,
    CASE
      WHEN pending_build_progress > 0 AND COALESCE(build_carried_energy, 0) = 0 THEN 'FIX_GAMEPLAY'
      WHEN rcl_level IS NULL OR stored_energy IS NULL OR (cpu_used IS NULL AND cpu_bucket IS NULL) THEN 'FIX_INSTRUMENTATION'
      ELSE 'WATCH'
    END AS status,
    CASE
      WHEN pending_build_progress > 0 AND COALESCE(build_carried_energy, 0) = 0 THEN 'Prioritize builder energy/construction stall fix for this room.'
      WHEN rcl_level IS NULL OR stored_energy IS NULL THEN 'Repair runtime room RCL/storage instrumentation.'
      WHEN cpu_used IS NULL AND cpu_bucket IS NULL THEN 'Instrument CPU/bucket telemetry for room health ranking.'
      ELSE 'Keep monitoring; no immediate gameplay blocker from latest room row.'
    END AS action,
    latest_rooms.observed_at AS evidence_utc,
    latest_rooms.source_artifact AS evidence
  FROM latest_rooms
  LEFT JOIN findings_by_room ON findings_by_room.room_name = latest_rooms.room_name
)
SELECT priority, room, rcl, stored_energy, extension_capacity, construction_backlog, build_activity,
       defense_state, creep_efficiency_state, cpu_reliability_state, status, action, evidence_utc, evidence
FROM ranked
UNION ALL
SELECT 999, 'NO_RUNTIME_ROOM_ROWS', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'NO_DATA', 'NO_DATA', 'NO_DATA', 'NO_DATA',
       'STALE_DATA', 'Refresh runtime_room_metrics before ranking gameplay bottlenecks.', NULL,
       'runtime-artifacts/runtime-summary-console/'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM latest_rooms)
ORDER BY priority, room;

targets.queryText:
WITH ranked_findings AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN category = 'stalled-construction' THEN 'construction_stall_details' ELSE 'top_gameplay_behavior_findings' END AS section,
    first_seen_at AS observed_at,
    severity,
    category,
    room_name,
    finding_key,
    metric_name,
    evidence_json,
    recommendation,
    source_artifact
  FROM gameplay_behavior_findings
  ORDER BY CASE severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 0 WHEN 'error' THEN 1 WHEN 'warning' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,
           first_seen_at DESC
  LIMIT 100
)
SELECT section, observed_at, severity, category, room_name, finding_key, metric_name,
       recommendation AS action, evidence_json AS evidence, source_artifact
FROM ranked_findings
UNION ALL
SELECT 'top_gameplay_behavior_findings', NULL, 'info', 'none', NULL, 'NO_GAMEPLAY_FINDINGS', NULL,
       'No gameplay_behavior_findings rows exist; refresh ingestion before concluding gameplay is healthy.',
       'explicit fallback row', 'runtime-artifacts/rl-metrics/rl_metrics.sqlite'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ranked_findings)
ORDER BY observed_at DESC;
targets.rawQueryText:
WITH ranked_findings AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN category = 'stalled-construction' THEN 'construction_stall_details' ELSE 'top_gameplay_behavior_findings' END AS section,
    first_seen_at AS observed_at,
    severity,
    category,
    room_name,
    finding_key,
    metric_name,
    evidence_json,
    recommendation,
    source_artifact
  FROM gameplay_behavior_findings
  ORDER BY CASE severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 0 WHEN 'error' THEN 1 WHEN 'warning' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,
           first_seen_at DESC
  LIMIT 100
)
SELECT section, observed_at, severity, category, room_name, finding_key, metric_name,
       recommendation AS action, evidence_json AS evidence, source_artifact
FROM ranked_findings
UNION ALL
SELECT 'top_gameplay_behavior_findings', NULL, 'info', 'none', NULL, 'NO_GAMEPLAY_FINDINGS', NULL,
       'No gameplay_behavior_findings rows exist; refresh ingestion before concluding gameplay is healthy.',
       'explicit fallback row', 'runtime-artifacts/rl-metrics/rl_metrics.sqlite'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ranked_findings)
ORDER BY observed_at DESC;

targets.queryText:
WITH latest_tick AS (
  SELECT MAX(tick) AS tick FROM runtime_room_metrics
), previous_tick AS (
  SELECT MAX(tick) AS tick FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE tick < (SELECT tick FROM latest_tick)
), latest_rooms AS (
  SELECT room_name, tick, rcl_level, stored_energy, extension_count, extension_capacity_contribution,
         pending_build_progress, construction_site_count, observed_at, source_artifact
  FROM runtime_room_metrics
  WHERE tick = (SELECT tick FROM latest_tick)
), previous_rooms AS (
  SELECT room_name, rcl_level, stored_energy, extension_capacity_contribution
  FROM runtime_room_metrics
  WHERE tick = (SELECT tick FROM previous_tick)
), owned_metric AS (
  SELECT observed_at, value AS owned_rooms, source_artifact
  FROM metric_observations
  WHERE metric_name = 'survival.owned_rooms'
  ORDER BY observed_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
), runtime_owned AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT room_name) AS room_count FROM latest_rooms
), room_rows AS (
  SELECT 'room_trajectory' AS section, latest_rooms.room_name AS room, latest_rooms.rcl_level AS rcl,
         latest_rooms.rcl_level - previous_rooms.rcl_level AS rcl_delta,
         latest_rooms.stored_energy,
         latest_rooms.stored_energy - previous_rooms.stored_energy AS stored_energy_delta,
         latest_rooms.extension_capacity_contribution AS extension_capacity,
         latest_rooms.extension_capacity_contribution - previous_rooms.extension_capacity_contribution AS extension_capacity_delta,
         CASE
           WHEN latest_rooms.rcl_level >= 4 AND latest_rooms.stored_energy >= 10000 THEN 'EXPANSION_CANDIDATE_SOON'
           WHEN latest_rooms.rcl_level IS NULL OR latest_rooms.stored_energy IS NULL THEN 'FIX_INSTRUMENTATION'
           ELSE 'NOT_READY'
         END AS expansion_readiness,
         CASE
           WHEN latest_rooms.pending_build_progress > 0 AND latest_rooms.construction_site_count = 0 THEN 'SEMANTIC_INCONSISTENCY'
           ELSE 'MEASURED'
         END AS semantic_status,
         CASE
           WHEN latest_rooms.pending_build_progress > 0 AND latest_rooms.construction_site_count = 0 THEN 'Investigate backlog-without-sites inconsistency before plotting zero progress.'
           WHEN latest_rooms.rcl_level >= 4 AND latest_rooms.stored_energy >= 10000 THEN 'Review expansion/canary prerequisites, not automatic rollout.'
           ELSE 'Keep collecting trajectory evidence.'
         END AS action,
         latest_rooms.observed_at AS evidence_utc,
         latest_rooms.source_artifact AS evidence
  FROM latest_rooms
  LEFT JOIN previous_rooms ON previous_rooms.room_name = latest_rooms.room_name
), consistency AS (
  SELECT 'owned_room_consistency' AS section, NULL AS room, NULL AS rcl, NULL AS rcl_delta,
         owned_metric.owned_rooms AS stored_energy, NULL AS stored_energy_delta,
         runtime_owned.room_count AS extension_capacity, NULL AS extension_capacity_delta,
         CASE WHEN owned_metric.owned_rooms IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA' ELSE 'CHECKED' END AS expansion_readiness,
         CASE
           WHEN owned_metric.owned_rooms IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA'
           WHEN CAST(owned_metric.owned_rooms AS INTEGER) != runtime_owned.room_count THEN 'SEMANTIC_INCONSISTENCY'
           ELSE 'MEASURED'
         END AS semantic_status,
         CASE
           WHEN owned_metric.owned_rooms IS NULL THEN 'Refresh survival.owned_rooms observations.'
           WHEN CAST(owned_metric.owned_rooms AS INTEGER) != runtime_owned.room_count THEN 'Align owned-room metric and runtime_room_metrics room coverage before expansion decisions.'
           ELSE 'Owned-room metric agrees with runtime room rows.'
         END AS action,
         owned_metric.observed_at AS evidence_utc,
         COALESCE(owned_metric.source_artifact, 'metric_observations') AS evidence
  FROM runtime_owned
  LEFT JOIN owned_metric ON 1 = 1
)
SELECT section, room, rcl, rcl_delta, stored_energy, stored_energy_delta, extension_capacity,
       extension_capacity_delta, expansion_readiness, semantic_status, action, evidence_utc, evidence
FROM room_rows
UNION ALL
SELECT section, room, rcl, rcl_delta, stored_energy, stored_energy_delta, extension_capacity,
       extension_capacity_delta, expansion_readiness, semantic_status, action, evidence_utc, evidence
FROM consistency
UNION ALL
SELECT 'room_trajectory', 'NO_RUNTIME_ROOM_ROWS', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'STALE_DATA', 'NO_DATA',
       'Refresh runtime_room_metrics before interpreting economy or territory trajectory.', NULL,
       'runtime-artifacts/runtime-summary-console/'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM latest_rooms)
ORDER BY section, room;
targets.rawQueryText:
WITH latest_tick AS (
  SELECT MAX(tick) AS tick FROM runtime_room_metrics
), previous_tick AS (
  SELECT MAX(tick) AS tick FROM runtime_room_metrics WHERE tick < (SELECT tick FROM latest_tick)
), latest_rooms AS (
  SELECT room_name, tick, rcl_level, stored_energy, extension_count, extension_capacity_contribution,
         pending_build_progress, construction_site_count, observed_at, source_artifact
  FROM runtime_room_metrics
  WHERE tick = (SELECT tick FROM latest_tick)
), previous_rooms AS (
  SELECT room_name, rcl_level, stored_energy, extension_capacity_contribution
  FROM runtime_room_metrics
  WHERE tick = (SELECT tick FROM previous_tick)
), owned_metric AS (
  SELECT observed_at, value AS owned_rooms, source_artifact
  FROM metric_observations
  WHERE metric_name = 'survival.owned_rooms'
  ORDER BY observed_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
), runtime_owned AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT room_name) AS room_count FROM latest_rooms
), room_rows AS (
  SELECT 'room_trajectory' AS section, latest_rooms.room_name AS room, latest_rooms.rcl_level AS rcl,
         latest_rooms.rcl_level - previous_rooms.rcl_level AS rcl_delta,
         latest_rooms.stored_energy,
         latest_rooms.stored_energy - previous_rooms.stored_energy AS stored_energy_delta,
         latest_rooms.extension_capacity_contribution AS extension_capacity,
         latest_rooms.extension_capacity_contribution - previous_rooms.extension_capacity_contribution AS extension_capacity_delta,
         CASE
           WHEN latest_rooms.rcl_level >= 4 AND latest_rooms.stored_energy >= 10000 THEN 'EXPANSION_CANDIDATE_SOON'
           WHEN latest_rooms.rcl_level IS NULL OR latest_rooms.stored_energy IS NULL THEN 'FIX_INSTRUMENTATION'
           ELSE 'NOT_READY'
         END AS expansion_readiness,
         CASE
           WHEN latest_rooms.pending_build_progress > 0 AND latest_rooms.construction_site_count = 0 THEN 'SEMANTIC_INCONSISTENCY'
           ELSE 'MEASURED'
         END AS semantic_status,
         CASE
           WHEN latest_rooms.pending_build_progress > 0 AND latest_rooms.construction_site_count = 0 THEN 'Investigate backlog-without-sites inconsistency before plotting zero progress.'
           WHEN latest_rooms.rcl_level >= 4 AND latest_rooms.stored_energy >= 10000 THEN 'Review expansion/canary prerequisites, not automatic rollout.'
           ELSE 'Keep collecting trajectory evidence.'
         END AS action,
         latest_rooms.observed_at AS evidence_utc,
         latest_rooms.source_artifact AS evidence
  FROM latest_rooms
  LEFT JOIN previous_rooms ON previous_rooms.room_name = latest_rooms.room_name
), consistency AS (
  SELECT 'owned_room_consistency' AS section, NULL AS room, NULL AS rcl, NULL AS rcl_delta,
         owned_metric.owned_rooms AS stored_energy, NULL AS stored_energy_delta,
         runtime_owned.room_count AS extension_capacity, NULL AS extension_capacity_delta,
         CASE WHEN owned_metric.owned_rooms IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA' ELSE 'CHECKED' END AS expansion_readiness,
         CASE
           WHEN owned_metric.owned_rooms IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA'
           WHEN CAST(owned_metric.owned_rooms AS INTEGER) != runtime_owned.room_count THEN 'SEMANTIC_INCONSISTENCY'
           ELSE 'MEASURED'
         END AS semantic_status,
         CASE
           WHEN owned_metric.owned_rooms IS NULL THEN 'Refresh survival.owned_rooms observations.'
           WHEN CAST(owned_metric.owned_rooms AS INTEGER) != runtime_owned.room_count THEN 'Align owned-room metric and runtime_room_metrics room coverage before expansion decisions.'
           ELSE 'Owned-room metric agrees with runtime room rows.'
         END AS action,
         owned_metric.observed_at AS evidence_utc,
         COALESCE(owned_metric.source_artifact, 'metric_observations') AS evidence
  FROM runtime_owned
  LEFT JOIN owned_metric ON 1 = 1
)
SELECT section, room, rcl, rcl_delta, stored_energy, stored_energy_delta, extension_capacity,
       extension_capacity_delta, expansion_readiness, semantic_status, action, evidence_utc, evidence
FROM room_rows
UNION ALL
SELECT section, room, rcl, rcl_delta, stored_energy, stored_energy_delta, extension_capacity,
       extension_capacity_delta, expansion_readiness, semantic_status, action, evidence_utc, evidence
FROM consistency
UNION ALL
SELECT 'room_trajectory', 'NO_RUNTIME_ROOM_ROWS', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'STALE_DATA', 'NO_DATA',
       'Refresh runtime_room_metrics before interpreting economy or territory trajectory.', NULL,
       'runtime-artifacts/runtime-summary-console/'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM latest_rooms)
ORDER BY section, room;

targets.queryText:
WITH latest_gate_time AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS observed_at FROM rl_dataset_gate_metrics
), latest_gate AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS observed_at,
         MAX(gate_id) AS gate_id,
         MAX(status) AS status,
         MAX(source_artifact) AS source_artifact,
         MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'rl.dataset_gate.sample_count' THEN value END) AS sample_count,
         MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'rl.dataset_gate.quality_samples_accepted' THEN value END) AS accepted_samples,
         MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'rl.dataset_gate.quality_samples_rejected' THEN value END) AS rejected_samples
  FROM rl_dataset_gate_metrics
  WHERE observed_at = (SELECT observed_at FROM latest_gate_time)
), training AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS observed_at, COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) AS report_count,
         MAX(source_artifact) AS source_artifact
  FROM rl_training_execution_metrics
), scorecard AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS observed_at, COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) AS report_count,
         COALESCE(SUM(value), 0) AS utility_delta,
         MAX(source_artifact) AS source_artifact
  FROM rl_policy_advantage_metrics
  WHERE report_id = (SELECT report_id FROM rl_policy_advantage_metrics ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 1)
), rejection AS (
  SELECT first_seen_at, finding_key, severity, evidence_json, recommendation, source_artifact
  FROM gameplay_behavior_findings
  WHERE category = 'rl-gate-rejection'
  ORDER BY first_seen_at DESC
  LIMIT 5
), readiness AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN latest_gate.status IS NOT NULL
      AND lower(latest_gate.status) = 'pass'
      AND COALESCE(latest_gate.sample_count, 0) >= 200
      AND training.observed_at IS NOT NULL
      AND scorecard.observed_at IS NOT NULL
      AND (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', latest_gate.observed_at)) <= 86400
      AND (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', training.observed_at)) <= 86400
      AND (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', scorecard.observed_at)) <= 86400
      AND scorecard.utility_delta > 0
    THEN 'READY'
    ELSE 'NOT_READY'
  END AS rollout_readiness
  FROM latest_gate, training, scorecard
)
SELECT 'latest_dataset_gate' AS gate_row, COALESCE(latest_gate.status, 'MISSING') AS status,
       latest_gate.observed_at AS evidence_utc,
       'samples=' || COALESCE(CAST(latest_gate.sample_count AS TEXT), 'missing') || '; accepted=' || COALESCE(CAST(latest_gate.accepted_samples AS TEXT), 'missing') || '; rejected=' || COALESCE(CAST(latest_gate.rejected_samples AS TEXT), 'missing') AS evidence,
       COALESCE(latest_gate.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-control-loop/') AS source_artifact,
       CASE WHEN latest_gate.status IS NULL THEN 'Run dataset gate before training.' WHEN lower(latest_gate.status) != 'pass' THEN 'Inspect rejection reasons and collect better samples.' ELSE 'Gate passed; still require fresh training/scorecard proof.' END AS next_action
FROM latest_gate
UNION ALL
SELECT 'training_freshness', CASE WHEN training.observed_at IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA' WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', training.observed_at)) <= 86400 THEN 'FRESH' ELSE 'STALE_DATA' END,
       training.observed_at, 'reports=' || training.report_count, COALESCE(training.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-training/'),
       'Refresh training if stale before any rollout/canary.'
FROM training
UNION ALL
SELECT 'scorecard_freshness', CASE WHEN scorecard.observed_at IS NULL THEN 'BLOCKER_NO_SCORECARD' WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', scorecard.observed_at)) <= 86400 THEN 'FRESH' ELSE 'STALE_DATA' END,
       scorecard.observed_at, 'utilityDelta=' || scorecard.utility_delta || '; reports=' || scorecard.report_count, COALESCE(scorecard.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-training/'),
       'Generate fresh scorecard and category deltas before rollout.'
FROM scorecard
UNION ALL
SELECT 'gate_rejection_reason', severity, first_seen_at, evidence_json, source_artifact, recommendation
FROM rejection
UNION ALL
SELECT 'gate_rejection_reason', 'NO_CURRENT_REJECTION', NULL, 'No rl-gate-rejection findings in gameplay_behavior_findings.', 'gameplay_behavior_findings', 'Continue to require fresh/scaled proof.'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM rejection)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'rollout_canary_readiness', readiness.rollout_readiness, NULL,
       'Defaults to NOT_READY unless dataset gate, training, scorecard, scale, and utility proof are all fresh.',
       'dashboard readiness rule',
       CASE WHEN readiness.rollout_readiness = 'READY' THEN 'Controller may prepare canary with rollback criteria.' ELSE 'Do not roll out; fix stale/missing proof first.' END
FROM readiness;
targets.rawQueryText:
WITH latest_gate_time AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS observed_at FROM rl_dataset_gate_metrics
), latest_gate AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS observed_at,
         MAX(gate_id) AS gate_id,
         MAX(status) AS status,
         MAX(source_artifact) AS source_artifact,
         MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'rl.dataset_gate.sample_count' THEN value END) AS sample_count,
         MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'rl.dataset_gate.quality_samples_accepted' THEN value END) AS accepted_samples,
         MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'rl.dataset_gate.quality_samples_rejected' THEN value END) AS rejected_samples
  FROM rl_dataset_gate_metrics
  WHERE observed_at = (SELECT observed_at FROM latest_gate_time)
), training AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS observed_at, COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) AS report_count,
         MAX(source_artifact) AS source_artifact
  FROM rl_training_execution_metrics
), scorecard AS (
  SELECT MAX(observed_at) AS observed_at, COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) AS report_count,
         COALESCE(SUM(value), 0) AS utility_delta,
         MAX(source_artifact) AS source_artifact
  FROM rl_policy_advantage_metrics
  WHERE report_id = (SELECT report_id FROM rl_policy_advantage_metrics ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 1)
), rejection AS (
  SELECT first_seen_at, finding_key, severity, evidence_json, recommendation, source_artifact
  FROM gameplay_behavior_findings
  WHERE category = 'rl-gate-rejection'
  ORDER BY first_seen_at DESC
  LIMIT 5
), readiness AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN latest_gate.status IS NOT NULL
      AND lower(latest_gate.status) = 'pass'
      AND COALESCE(latest_gate.sample_count, 0) >= 200
      AND training.observed_at IS NOT NULL
      AND scorecard.observed_at IS NOT NULL
      AND (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', latest_gate.observed_at)) <= 86400
      AND (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', training.observed_at)) <= 86400
      AND (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', scorecard.observed_at)) <= 86400
      AND scorecard.utility_delta > 0
    THEN 'READY'
    ELSE 'NOT_READY'
  END AS rollout_readiness
  FROM latest_gate, training, scorecard
)
SELECT 'latest_dataset_gate' AS gate_row, COALESCE(latest_gate.status, 'MISSING') AS status,
       latest_gate.observed_at AS evidence_utc,
       'samples=' || COALESCE(CAST(latest_gate.sample_count AS TEXT), 'missing') || '; accepted=' || COALESCE(CAST(latest_gate.accepted_samples AS TEXT), 'missing') || '; rejected=' || COALESCE(CAST(latest_gate.rejected_samples AS TEXT), 'missing') AS evidence,
       COALESCE(latest_gate.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-control-loop/') AS source_artifact,
       CASE WHEN latest_gate.status IS NULL THEN 'Run dataset gate before training.' WHEN lower(latest_gate.status) != 'pass' THEN 'Inspect rejection reasons and collect better samples.' ELSE 'Gate passed; still require fresh training/scorecard proof.' END AS next_action
FROM latest_gate
UNION ALL
SELECT 'training_freshness', CASE WHEN training.observed_at IS NULL THEN 'STALE_DATA' WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', training.observed_at)) <= 86400 THEN 'FRESH' ELSE 'STALE_DATA' END,
       training.observed_at, 'reports=' || training.report_count, COALESCE(training.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-training/'),
       'Refresh training if stale before any rollout/canary.'
FROM training
UNION ALL
SELECT 'scorecard_freshness', CASE WHEN scorecard.observed_at IS NULL THEN 'BLOCKER_NO_SCORECARD' WHEN (strftime('%s','now') - strftime('%s', scorecard.observed_at)) <= 86400 THEN 'FRESH' ELSE 'STALE_DATA' END,
       scorecard.observed_at, 'utilityDelta=' || scorecard.utility_delta || '; reports=' || scorecard.report_count, COALESCE(scorecard.source_artifact, 'runtime-artifacts/rl-training/'),
       'Generate fresh scorecard and category deltas before rollout.'
FROM scorecard
UNION ALL
SELECT 'gate_rejection_reason', severity, first_seen_at, evidence_json, source_artifact, recommendation
FROM rejection
UNION ALL
SELECT 'gate_rejection_reason', 'NO_CURRENT_REJECTION', NULL, 'No rl-gate-rejection findings in gameplay_behavior_findings.', 'gameplay_behavior_findings', 'Continue to require fresh/scaled proof.'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM rejection)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'rollout_canary_readiness', readiness.rollout_readiness, NULL,
       'Defaults to NOT_READY unless dataset gate, training, scorecard, scale, and utility proof are all fresh.',
       'dashboard readiness rule',
       CASE WHEN readiness.rollout_readiness = 'READY' THEN 'Controller may prepare canary with rollback criteria.' ELSE 'Do not roll out; fix stale/missing proof first.' END
FROM readiness;

targets.queryText:
WITH expected_metrics(metric_name, why_it_matters, next_action) AS (
  VALUES
    ('creep.stuck_ticks', 'Stuck/actionless creeps make policy improvements look better than they are.', 'Instrument creep stuck/actionless ticks.'),
    ('creep.low_load_return_count', 'Low-load returns waste worker trips and hide economy regressions.', 'Record low-load return counts and load factor.'),
    ('cpu.used', 'CPU spikes can cause tick-loop failures during rollout.', 'Record CPU used in runtime room metrics or metric observations.'),
    ('cpu.bucket', 'Low CPU bucket blocks safe sustained automation.', 'Record CPU bucket freshness.'),
    ('reliability.loop_exception_count', 'Loop exceptions are a hard stop for rollout.', 'Record loop exception counts from runtime summaries.'),
    ('reliability.telemetry_silence_ticks', 'Telemetry silence makes Grafana decisions unsafe.', 'Record telemetry silence windows.'),
    ('territory.controller_progress', 'Controller progress proves territory/RCL trajectory instead of plotting zeros.', 'Add controller progress/RCL delta to runtime metrics.'),
    ('upgrade.carried_energy', 'Upgrade energy separates real controller work from idle hauling.', 'Record upgrader carried/spent energy.'),
    ('economy.import_demand', 'Import demand shows whether multi-room logistics are blocking growth.', 'Record import demand per room.'),
    ('economy.blocked_import_energy', 'Blocked imports identify logistics bottlenecks before rollout.', 'Record blocked import energy.'),
    ('economy.multi_room_deficit_energy', 'Deficit energy decides whether expansion is safe.', 'Record multi-room deficit energy.')
), observations AS (
  SELECT metric_name, COUNT(*) AS observation_count, MAX(observed_at) AS latest_observed_at
  FROM metric_observations
  GROUP BY metric_name
), gaps AS (
  SELECT metric_name, COUNT(*) AS gap_count, MAX(observed_at) AS latest_gap_at,
         group_concat(DISTINCT gap_type) AS gap_types,
         MAX(message) AS latest_message
  FROM metric_coverage_gaps
  GROUP BY metric_name
), blockers AS (
  SELECT expected_metrics.metric_name,
         CASE
           WHEN COALESCE(observations.observation_count, 0) = 0 THEN 'BLOCKER_MISSING_METRIC'
           WHEN COALESCE(gaps.gap_count, 0) > 0 THEN 'BLOCKER_COVERAGE_GAP'
           ELSE 'COVERED'
         END AS status,
         COALESCE(observations.observation_count, 0) AS observation_count,
         COALESCE(gaps.gap_count, 0) AS gap_count,
         observations.latest_observed_at,
         gaps.latest_gap_at,
         COALESCE(gaps.gap_types, 'none') AS gap_types,
         COALESCE(gaps.latest_message, 'No gap row; metric is expected by Check/Act v2 but absent from observations.') AS evidence,
         expected_metrics.why_it_matters,
         expected_metrics.next_action
  FROM expected_metrics
  LEFT JOIN observations ON observations.metric_name = expected_metrics.metric_name
  LEFT JOIN gaps ON gaps.metric_name = expected_metrics.metric_name
  WHERE COALESCE(observations.observation_count, 0) = 0 OR COALESCE(gaps.gap_count, 0) > 0
)
SELECT metric_name, status, observation_count, gap_count, latest_observed_at, latest_gap_at,
       gap_types, why_it_matters, next_action, evidence
FROM blockers
UNION ALL
SELECT 'coverage_ok', 'COVERED', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'none',
       'All required Check/Act v2 metrics have observations and no coverage gaps.',
       'Keep monitoring coverage drift.', 'explicit fallback row'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM blockers)
ORDER BY status DESC, gap_count DESC, metric_name;
targets.rawQueryText:
WITH expected_metrics(metric_name, why_it_matters, next_action) AS (
  VALUES
    ('creep.stuck_ticks', 'Stuck/actionless creeps make policy improvements look better than they are.', 'Instrument creep stuck/actionless ticks.'),
    ('creep.low_load_return_count', 'Low-load returns waste worker trips and hide economy regressions.', 'Record low-load return counts and load factor.'),
    ('cpu.used', 'CPU spikes can cause tick-loop failures during rollout.', 'Record CPU used in runtime room metrics or metric observations.'),
    ('cpu.bucket', 'Low CPU bucket blocks safe sustained automation.', 'Record CPU bucket freshness.'),
    ('reliability.loop_exception_count', 'Loop exceptions are a hard stop for rollout.', 'Record loop exception counts from runtime summaries.'),
    ('reliability.telemetry_silence_ticks', 'Telemetry silence makes Grafana decisions unsafe.', 'Record telemetry silence windows.'),
    ('territory.controller_progress', 'Controller progress proves territory/RCL trajectory instead of plotting zeros.', 'Add controller progress/RCL delta to runtime metrics.'),
    ('upgrade.carried_energy', 'Upgrade energy separates real controller work from idle hauling.', 'Record upgrader carried/spent energy.'),
    ('economy.import_demand', 'Import demand shows whether multi-room logistics are blocking growth.', 'Record import demand per room.'),
    ('economy.blocked_import_energy', 'Blocked imports identify logistics bottlenecks before rollout.', 'Record blocked import energy.'),
    ('economy.multi_room_deficit_energy', 'Deficit energy decides whether expansion is safe.', 'Record multi-room deficit energy.')
), observations AS (
  SELECT metric_name, COUNT(*) AS observation_count, MAX(observed_at) AS latest_observed_at
  FROM metric_observations
  GROUP BY metric_name
), gaps AS (
  SELECT metric_name, COUNT(*) AS gap_count, MAX(observed_at) AS latest_gap_at,
         group_concat(DISTINCT gap_type) AS gap_types,
         MAX(message) AS latest_message
  FROM metric_coverage_gaps
  GROUP BY metric_name
), blockers AS (
  SELECT expected_metrics.metric_name,
         CASE
           WHEN COALESCE(observations.observation_count, 0) = 0 THEN 'BLOCKER_MISSING_METRIC'
           WHEN COALESCE(gaps.gap_count, 0) > 0 THEN 'BLOCKER_COVERAGE_GAP'
           ELSE 'COVERED'
         END AS status,
         COALESCE(observations.observation_count, 0) AS observation_count,
         COALESCE(gaps.gap_count, 0) AS gap_count,
         observations.latest_observed_at,
         gaps.latest_gap_at,
         COALESCE(gaps.gap_types, 'none') AS gap_types,
         COALESCE(gaps.latest_message, 'No gap row; metric is expected by Check/Act v2 but absent from observations.') AS evidence,
         expected_metrics.why_it_matters,
         expected_metrics.next_action
  FROM expected_metrics
  LEFT JOIN observations ON observations.metric_name = expected_metrics.metric_name
  LEFT JOIN gaps ON gaps.metric_name = expected_metrics.metric_name
  WHERE COALESCE(observations.observation_count, 0) = 0 OR COALESCE(gaps.gap_count, 0) > 0
)
SELECT metric_name, status, observation_count, gap_count, latest_observed_at, latest_gap_at,
       gap_types, why_it_matters, next_action, evidence
FROM blockers
UNION ALL
SELECT 'coverage_ok', 'COVERED', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'none',
       'All required Check/Act v2 metrics have observations and no coverage gaps.',
       'Keep monitoring coverage drift.', 'explicit fallback row'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM blockers)
ORDER BY status DESC, gap_count DESC, metric_name;

targets.queryText:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT created_at, decision_key, status, source_artifact, rationale, evidence_json
  FROM metric_iteration_decisions
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 100
)
SELECT created_at,
       CASE
         WHEN lower(COALESCE(decision_key, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(source_artifact, '')) LIKE '%reward%' THEN 'reward_change'
         WHEN lower(COALESCE(decision_key, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(source_artifact, '')) LIKE '%policy%' THEN 'model_policy_change'
         WHEN lower(COALESCE(decision_key, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(source_artifact, '')) LIKE '%runtime%' OR lower(COALESCE(decision_key, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(source_artifact, '')) LIKE '%gameplay%' THEN 'gameplay_change'
         ELSE 'decision_observation'
       END AS change_type,
       status,
       decision_key,
       rationale AS hypothesis,
       'Expected movement is recorded in evidence_json/source artifact; dashboard blocks rollout if this is missing or stale.' AS expected_metric_movement,
       'Rollback on stale proof, safety/reliability regression, or non-positive utility delta.' AS rollback_criteria,
       '#1627' AS linked_issue,
       source_artifact AS linked_scorecard_or_artifact,
       evidence_json
FROM latest
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL, 'decision_ledger', 'BLOCKER_NO_LEDGER', 'NO_DECISION_LEDGER',
       'No metric_iteration_decisions rows exist; reward/model/gameplay changes are not auditable.',
       'Create a decision ledger entry with expected metric movement.',
       'Do not roll out without rollback criteria.', '#1627', 'runtime-artifacts/rl-control-loop/', '{}'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM latest)
ORDER BY created_at DESC;
targets.rawQueryText:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT created_at, decision_key, status, source_artifact, rationale, evidence_json
  FROM metric_iteration_decisions
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 100
)
SELECT created_at,
       CASE
         WHEN lower(COALESCE(decision_key, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(source_artifact, '')) LIKE '%reward%' THEN 'reward_change'
         WHEN lower(COALESCE(decision_key, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(source_artifact, '')) LIKE '%policy%' THEN 'model_policy_change'
         WHEN lower(COALESCE(decision_key, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(source_artifact, '')) LIKE '%runtime%' OR lower(COALESCE(decision_key, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(source_artifact, '')) LIKE '%gameplay%' THEN 'gameplay_change'
         ELSE 'decision_observation'
       END AS change_type,
       status,
       decision_key,
       rationale AS hypothesis,
       'Expected movement is recorded in evidence_json/source artifact; dashboard blocks rollout if this is missing or stale.' AS expected_metric_movement,
       'Rollback on stale proof, safety/reliability regression, or non-positive utility delta.' AS rollback_criteria,
       '#1627' AS linked_issue,
       source_artifact AS linked_scorecard_or_artifact,
       evidence_json
FROM latest
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL, 'decision_ledger', 'BLOCKER_NO_LEDGER', 'NO_DECISION_LEDGER',
       'No metric_iteration_decisions rows exist; reward/model/gameplay changes are not auditable.',
       'Create a decision ledger entry with expected metric movement.',
       'Do not roll out without rollback criteria.', '#1627', 'runtime-artifacts/rl-control-loop/', '{}'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM latest)
ORDER BY created_at DESC;
